div.h2: Edge-Triggered Drain Loop — Correct vs. Incorrect

g.text: WRONG: Single Read per ET Event
Rule: EPOLLET fires ONCE per not-ready → ready transition
Implication: unread bytes in kernel buf cause NO further notifications
Fix: call read() in a loop until errno == EAGAIN (buffer empty)
Diagnosis: ss -ti shows rcv_buf bytes with idle connection = ET drain bug
No new data arrives → no ET transition
epoll_wait() notifies on NEXT new data
